relatedFeatures.reason: Start with Records when you want an earlier building block for Required Members.
Continue to Primary constructors for the next guide in this theme.
Explore Init accessors for another earlier stepping stone in the same theme.

examples.title: Marking properties as required
examples.description: The required keyword ensures that properties must be initialized when creating an instance, with compile-time enforcement.

examples.title: Required with init-only properties
examples.description: Combine required with init-only properties for immutable objects with compile-time initialization guarantees.
